case_title: ZENG BANG XU et al VS. WINNIE GUO ET AL.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY XU, ZENG BANG LUO, MANNA AS TO DEFENDANT GUO, WINNIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-12-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO WINNIE GUO 1518 PALOU AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94124
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES -0- SERVED DEC-01-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GUO, WINNIE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-12-2013 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFFS TO FEB-03-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFFS TO FILE AN AMENDED CLAIM TO ADD ANOTHER DEFENDANT AND SERVE ALL DEFENDANTS PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVED UNTIMELY SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---MARILYN LUONG. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF AMENDING CLAIM. FILED BY PLAINTIFF XU, ZENG BANG LUO, MANNA
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY XU, ZENG BANG LUO, MANNA AS TO DEFENDANT GUO, WINNIE CHAUG, TERESA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES -0- SERVED DEC-15-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHAUG, TERESA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-03-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-03-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WINNIE GUO WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT ON THE AMENDED CLAIM. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---WANSHUN HO. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---MARILYN LUONG. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-03-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF XU, ZENG BANG LUO, MANNA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GUO, WINNIE CHAUG, TERESA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
